items.title: Salesforce Grants Equity Awards to Apromore, Spindle AI, and Informatica Employees Under Its Inducement Equity Incentive Plan
items.description: SAN FRANCISCO, January 27, 2026--Salesforce (NYSE: CRM), the #1 AI CRM, today announced it has granted equity awards under its 2014 Inducement Equity Incentive Plan (the "Plan") to new employees who joined Salesforce in connection with the acquisitions of Apromore, Spindle AI, and Informatica. The Plan was adopted by the Salesforce Board of Directors in July 2014, in accordance with New York Stock Exchange Rule 303A.08.

items.title: Salesforce Stock Rises on $5.6 Billion Army Contract
items.description: Salesforce Shares Climb After Its Unit Lands Major Military Deal

items.title: Slack has landed a starring role at Salesforce
items.description: Slack seemed destined to fall into a blackhole when acquired by Salesforce in 2021. Instead, it has been elevated to a central gateway of the Salesforce platform.

items.title: Salesforce Stock Loses Ground After $5.6 Billion Army Contract
items.description: Salesforce Inc shares have slipped into the red after giving up earlier gains. The company had announced a major government contract win.

items.title: Cloudflare Stock Pops On Anthropic's Claude AI Tools. Zoom Also Gets Anthropic Boost.
items.description: Cloudflare stock popped amid investor enthusiasm over its artificial intelligence strategy and partnership with model builder Anthropic.
